hawkish_phrases: an ongoing tightening of monetary policy over the forecast period would be appropriate
a small margin of excess demand was projected to emerge by early 2020
domestic cost pressures will continue to firm gradually
Most indicators of pay growth have picked up over the past year and the labour market remains tight
dovish_phrases: For the majority of members, an increase in Bank Rate was not required at this meeting
any future increases in Bank Rate are likely to be at a gradual pace and to a limited extent
the Committee has noted that it could lower it further if required
GDP was expected to grow by around 1¾% per year on average over the forecast
summary: The MPC voted 6-3 to hold Bank Rate at 0.5%, with the majority holding despite three hawkish dissents and clear guidance that ongoing tightening would be appropriate to return inflation sustainably to target.
